appnote:
- Fix HTTP 403 on HLS streams: video referer now correctly used as Origin header, matching the probe's validated behavior
- Fix volatile videoReferer for thread-safe cross-thread visibility (WebView thread to UI thread)
- Data source factory always honors provider-supplied referer as authoritative Origin header
